llm_report: {"severity_level": "L3", "severity_label": "Critical", "recommended_action": "Immediate structural repair and epoxy injection required.", "urgency_days": 7, "description": "Wide transverse crack spanning 65 cm² on load-bearing surface. High risk of propagation.", "estimated_cost_inr": 68000}

{"severity_level": "L3", "severity_label": "Critical", "recommended_action": "Remove loose concrete and apply shotcrete patch within one week.", "urgency_days": 7, "description": "Extensive concrete spalling exposing aggregate over 524 cm² on bridge deck.", "estimated_cost_inr": 52000}

{"severity_level": "L2", "severity_label": "Moderate", "recommended_action": "Apply rust converter and anti-corrosion coating within 30 days.", "urgency_days": 30, "description": "Surface corrosion on rebar-adjacent area covering 284 cm². Risk of rebar exposure if untreated.", "estimated_cost_inr": 41000}

{"severity_level": "L3", "severity_label": "Critical", "recommended_action": "Emergency jacketing and rebar treatment required within 48 hours.", "urgency_days": 2, "description": "Multiple rebar exposed over 718 cm² due to cover delamination. Structural integrity compromised.", "estimated_cost_inr": 120000}

{"severity_level": "L1", "severity_label": "Low", "recommended_action": "Clean with diluted acid wash and apply waterproof sealant within 90 days.", "urgency_days": 90, "description": "Minor white salt deposits on concrete surface, 47 cm². Indicates subsurface moisture ingress.", "estimated_cost_inr": 11000}

{"severity_level": "L2", "severity_label": "Moderate", "recommended_action": "Seal crack with polyurethane injection within 30 days.", "urgency_days": 30, "description": "Longitudinal crack 183 cm² width 1.2 mm on pier face. Monitor for widening.", "estimated_cost_inr": 32000}

{"severity_level": "L1", "severity_label": "Low", "recommended_action": "Surface patch with cementitious mortar during next maintenance cycle.", "urgency_days": 90, "description": "Minor surface spalling 82 cm² on parapet wall. No rebar exposure detected.", "estimated_cost_inr": 21000}

{"severity_level": "L3", "severity_label": "Critical", "recommended_action": "Blast clean to Sa 2.5 and apply zinc-rich epoxy primer within 7 days.", "urgency_days": 7, "description": "Severe pitting corrosion on steel bearing plate covering 585 cm². Risk of section loss.", "estimated_cost_inr": 82000}

{"severity_level": "L2", "severity_label": "Moderate", "recommended_action": "Apply corrosion inhibitor and concrete cover reinstatement within 30 days.", "urgency_days": 30, "description": "Partial rebar exposure 326 cm² on soffit. Rebar shows surface rust but no section loss.", "estimated_cost_inr": 48000}

{"severity_level": "L1", "severity_label": "Low", "recommended_action": "Monitor quarterly and apply silane siloxane waterproofing during dry season.", "urgency_days": 90, "description": "Calcium carbonate deposits near expansion joint, 94 cm². Mild leaching from concrete matrix.", "estimated_cost_inr": 14000}

{"severity_level": "L3", "severity_label": "Critical", "recommended_action": "Engage structural engineer, restrict traffic load, repair within 48 hours.", "urgency_days": 2, "description": "Full-depth diagonal shear crack 847 cm² on column face. Possible seismic or overload origin.", "estimated_cost_inr": 175000}

{"severity_level": "L2", "severity_label": "Moderate", "recommended_action": "Install protective netting and schedule concrete reinstatement within 30 days.", "urgency_days": 30, "description": "Moderate spalling on underside of deck slab, 417 cm². Aggregate exposed, no visible rebar.", "estimated_cost_inr": 55000}

{"severity_level": "L2", "severity_label": "Moderate", "recommended_action": "Wire brush, apply penetrating rust inhibitor and repaint within 30 days.", "urgency_days": 30, "description": "Moderate surface corrosion on steel handrail connection plate, 148 cm². Uniform rust layer.", "estimated_cost_inr": 28000}

{"severity_level": "L1", "severity_label": "Low", "recommended_action": "Clean rebar and reinstate concrete cover with polymer-modified mortar.", "urgency_days": 60, "description": "Minor rebar exposure at corner of kerb, 56 cm². {"severity_level": "L2", "severity_label": "Moderate", "recommended_action": "Identify and seal water ingress source, treat surface within 30 days.", "urgency_days": 30, "description": "Significant efflorescence staining 225 cm² below expansion joint.
